report_metadata.analysis_type: React Application Architecture & Code Duplication Review

A_DUPLICATION_MATRIX.description: Cross-page and cross-component functionality overlap analysis

high_priority_duplications.name: Sequence Analysis Components
duplicate_features: WHO/WHERE/WHAT/ACTION SOC model display (100% identical code)
locations: SequenceExplainability.jsx (lines 30-50: getThreatColor, getActionText, lines 75-160: SOC analysis)
high_priority_duplications.recommendation: MERGE into unified <SequenceAnalysisPanel> component with configurable layout

high_priority_duplications.name: Real-Time Log Streaming Logic
locations: RealtimeCorrelation.jsx (lines 13-26: startRealtimeGeneration, lines 47-62: stopRealtimeGeneration, lines 145-165: EventSource handler)
LiveTraffic.jsx (lines 20-45: startScan, lines 68-85: stopScan, lines 87-130: EventSource handler)
high_priority_duplications.recommendation: EXTRACT into custom hook: useRealtimeStream(eventRate, onLogReceived, onError)

high_priority_duplications.name: Correlation Analysis Page Structure
high_priority_duplications.recommendation: CREATE base <CorrelationResultsContainer> component, differentiate input sections only

high_priority_duplications.name: Toast Notification Patterns
duplicate_features: Custom toast structure (icon + title + message + close button + progress)
Icon selection logic (CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, Loader2, X)
high_priority_duplications.recommendations: CREATE utility functions: toastSuccess(), toastError(), toastLoading()
high_priority_duplications.example_duplicate: Dashboard.jsx lines 37-48 vs CorrelationAnalysis.jsx lines 53-63 (identical structure)

medium_priority_duplications.name: Metric Display & Calculation
medium_priority_duplications.duplicate_logic: Icon + label + value display patterns with custom styling
medium_priority_duplications.recommendation: CREATE <MetricCard> component to standardize metric display

feature_importance.shows: Which input features most influenced the attack prediction

class_probabilities.shows: Model's confidence distribution across attack types

threat_level_assessment.calculation: Based on attack_count vs sequence length

attack_timeline.shows: Which attacks occurred in what sequence and how many times

examples.CRITICAL: Block IP immediately. Isolate host. Initiate incident response.
examples.HIGH: Block IP. Monitor activity. Alert analyst.

auto_learned_rules.shows: Which patterns the system learned from detected attacks

threat_history.shows: Sequence of malicious detections in real-time

live_method_indication.shows: For each live log, which detector caught it

incident_tracking.shows: Historical context of previously detected threats
incident_tracking.limitations: No link to original analysis details or explanation

explainability_gaps.description: No explanation of which specific features in which logs caused the sequence-level threat detection
explainability_gaps.impact: Users cannot understand why entire sequence was flagged, only that it was

explainability_gaps.description: SequenceViewer shows logs but not individual explainability for each
explainability_gaps.impact: Users see logs in sequence but no per-log confidence or feature importance
explainability_gaps.example: Could show confidence trend across sequence

explainability_gaps.description: No explanation of timing-based attack patterns (e.g., coordinated attacks, escalation patterns)
explainability_gaps.impact: Multi-step sophisticated attacks not adequately explained

explainability_gaps.description: No visualization of transformer/attention weights or model decision path
explainability_gaps.note: final.ipynb shows transformer architecture not visualized in UI
explainability_gaps.impact: Cannot inspect what model layers are focusing on

explainability_gaps.description: No 'What-if' or 'Why did X happen?' interactive explanations
explainability_gaps.possible_example: Why wasn't this flagged earlier? What if we changed this feature?

explainability_gaps.description: No graph/network showing attack progression or pivot points
explainability_gaps.impact: Complex multi-stage attacks not visually represented

C_MISSING_FEATURES_FROM_FINAL_IPYNB.description: Features derived from ML model in final.ipynb not yet exposed in UI

unexposed_capabilities.implemented_in_notebook: Transformer architecture with MultiHeadAttention (4 heads, 64 key_dim)
unexposed_capabilities.potential_benefit: Show which time-steps in log sequence are most relevant to threat detection
unexposed_capabilities.suggested_component: AttentionHeatmap.jsx - visualize which logs in sequence contribute most

unexposed_capabilities.implemented_in_notebook: Encoder produces 64-dim embeddings for each sequence
unexposed_capabilities.potential_benefit: Show how sequences cluster in embedding space (similar attacks group together)
unexposed_capabilities.suggested_visualization: 2D t-SNE or UMAP projection of test sequences

unexposed_capabilities.implemented_in_notebook: Model produces prediction for full sequence
unexposed_capabilities.current_gap: Only shows binary verdict per sequence, not per-log confidence
unexposed_capabilities.suggested_component: SequenceConfidenceCurve.jsx - line chart showing confidence at each step

unexposed_capabilities.potential_benefit: Debug model decisions by inspecting what each layer learned

unexposed_capabilities.potential_use: Indicate confidence when attack has slight feature variations

unexposed_capabilities.potential_benefit: Highlight which input features most influence prediction

dataset_insights_not_shown.insight: Attack distribution in training data (from CSV metadata)
dataset_insights_not_shown.could_enrich: Analytics page - add comparison between live threats vs trained distribution

dataset_insights_not_shown.insight: Class-wise performance metrics (precision/recall per attack type)
dataset_insights_not_shown.could_enrich: Reports page - add confidence score context per attack type

Dashboard.current_purpose: Single-log analysis hub with sample selection and analysis pipeline
Dashboard.current_workflow: 1) Pick random/by-index sample → 2) View raw log → 3) Run analysis → 4) See verdict + explanation → 5) Optionally run correlation or add rule
recommended_improvements: Add 'History' tab to compare with similar samples
Add 'Feedback' mechanism to improve model
Keep as-is, well-designed for single log focus

Analytics.current_purpose: System-wide performance monitoring and historical statistics
recommended_improvements: Add predictive trend lines (e.g., attack growth projection)
Add attack type timeline breakdown by hour/day
Add resource alert thresholds
Add exportable dashboards
Analytics.gap: Currently static demo data - should connect to live backend metrics

CorrelationAnalysis.current_purpose: Ad-hoc sequence correlation analysis with sequence parameter control
CorrelationAnalysis.workflow: 1) Input start index + sequence length → 2) Run analysis → 3) View correlation results + threat details
recommended_improvements: Add sequence comparison (e.g., 'Compare this sequence to historical similar attacks')
Add export to PDF/JSON
Add saved analysis history
CorrelationAnalysis.differentiator: Deep investigative tool for security analysts

RealtimeCorrelation.current_purpose: Real-time log generation + streaming correlation analysis + auto-learning
RealtimeCorrelation.workflow: 1) Configure EPS → 2) Start streaming → 3) Real-time logs appear → 4) Analyze correlation window → 5) View auto-learned rules
recommended_improvements: Split into separate 'Auto-Learning Dashboard' vs 'Real-Time Monitor'
Add rule quality metrics (FP rate, coverage)
Add manual rule promotion/demotion

LiveTraffic.current_purpose: Real-time live monitoring with terminal-style log stream
LiveTraffic.workflow: 1) Configure EPS → 2) Start scan → 3) Watch live log stream with verdicts → 4) See real-time threat/safe breakdown
recommended_improvements: Add alert filtering (e.g., show only attacks, only slow logs)
Add packet capture/detail expansion on click
Add threat correlation quick-link to CorrelationAnalysis
Add incident creation from terminal row
Add severity/time distribution charts
Add MTTD/MTTR metrics
Add incident timeline view (Gantt)
Add link back to original analysis in Dashboard
Add false positive rate tracking
Add compliance export templates (SIEM, SOC2, etc)
Reports.gap: Currently static mock data - should integrate with backend incident database
Reports.differentiator: Compliance, management, and retrospective analysis tool

E_COMPONENT_ORGANIZATION_RECOMMENDATIONS.summary: Suggested refactoring to reduce duplication and improve maintainability

critical_actions.rationale: 80% code overlap, same data structure, same visual patterns
85% duplicate SSE handling, state management, error handling
critical_actions.new_usage_example: const {isRunning, logsCount, startStream, stopStream} = useRealtimeStream(eventRate, {onLogReceived: handleNewLog})

critical_actions.rationale: 90% similar toast structure repeated 30+ times across codebase

implementation.replaces: ~120+ inline toast.custom() calls across all pages

high_priority_actions.rationale: CorrelationAnalysis & RealtimeCorrelation have 70% identical results rendering
Metric display pattern repeated 20+ times across Dashboard, Analytics, RealtimeCorrelation, LiveTraffic

implementation.standardizes: All metric displays into consistent look

high_priority_actions.rationale: getThreatColor() and getThreatLevelColor() functions identical across components

implementation.replaces: Duplicate functions in SequenceExplainability, CorrelationInsights, RealtimeCorrelation

medium_priority_actions.rationale: All pages have similar header/content structure
Feature importance rendering currently only in ExplainPanel, should be reusable

tasks: Update pages to use new components/hooks
phase_2_refactor.testing_required: MEDIUM - need to verify page functionality

tasks: Add missing explainability features (sequence-level attribution, attention visualization)
Create new components for visualization (AttentionHeatmap, SequenceConfidenceCurve)
Integrate missing model insights from final.ipynb
